title: hermannia oblongifolia
intro: Hermannia oblongifolia, also known as the African potato, is a plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant is known to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. In terms of herbal preparations, Hermannia oblongifolia can be made into a decoction or infusion by steeping the roots in hot water, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
